name: Zoned Properties, Inc.
business: Zoned Properties is a technology-driven property investment company that acquires and leases commercial real estate to tenants in the regulated cannabis industry, and also provides advisory, brokerage, and technology services.
sellsTo: Licensed cannabis dispensaries and cultivation facilities

exposures.sentence: Zoned Properties is a technology-driven property investment company focused on acquiring value-add real estate within the regulated cannabis industry in the United States.

catalysts.event: Received payment of past due rent and compensation from tenant
catalysts.sentence: both of which were received by the Company on March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Option to purchase CKG properties expires
catalysts.sentence: optionee will have until April 10, 2026 to exercise the Purchase Option

catalysts.event: Closing of CKG property sale if option exercised
catalysts.sentence: if exercised, requires a closing no later than June 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: Closing of MBO expected by end of 2026
catalysts.sentence: the Company expects that the closing of the MBO will take place by the end of 2026.
